articles.description: After just over one day of deliberations, the jury found Tran guilty of second-degree murder.

articles.title: Council approves motion in support of low-income transit pass
articles.description: A motion introduced by Councillor Sean Orr called on city staff and TransLink to explore a pass costing just $25 a month for residents earning less than $40,000 annually.

articles.title: UK far-right accused of exploiting killing of Henry Nowak
articles.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer accused right-wing figures of exploiting the killing of Henry Nowak for political gain.

articles.title: China bans four New Zealand MPs over Taiwan visit
articles.description: Upon their return from Taiwan last month, the lawmakers were told that China had banned them for a year.

articles.title: LinkedIn China Spying Threat Prompts Warning From US, Allies
articles.description: The US and its “Five Eyes” intelligence partners issued what they said was an unprecedented joint notice warning about attempts by Chinese spies to use websites such as LinkedIn to recruit assets.

articles.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX eyes $1.77tn valuation ahead of historic IPO
articles.description: Texas-based rocket company announces plans to sell shares at $135 apiece, aiming to raise approximately $75bn.

articles.title: Langley RCMP impounds 6 vehicles for excessive speed
articles.description: On Tuesday, the Langley RCMP Traffic Enforcement Unit conducted a targeted enforcement in the area of 256 Street and 0 Avenue.

articles.title: Victim airlifted to hospital after shooting: Langley RCMP
articles.description: Police say one person was seriously injured, and the investigation is "in its infancy."

articles.title: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to ceasefire if Hezbollah stops hostilities
articles.description: ‘Israel and Lebanon reaffirmed that they have no hostile intent toward one another and committed to continuing direct negotiations,’ the statement said

articles.description: MUNICH — INNIO Group (“INNIO”), a leading global distributed energy solutions provider, today announces the pricing of its upsized initial public offering (the “IPO”) of 90,000,000 common shares at a public offering price of $27.00 per share. (TOKYO: 6981) (ISIN: JP3914400001) introduces the GCJ21BD72A225KE02, a soft-termination chip multilayer ceramic capacitor (MLCC) for automotive powertrain and safety equipment. articles.title: Rubio distances himself from Netanyahu’s Gaza plan
articles.description: House Democrats question US Secretary of State Marco Rubio about the lack of progress on Trump’s 20 point Gaza plan.

articles.title: Grey Cup up for grabs as 2026 CFL season begins Thursday
articles.description: Will Saskatchewan repeat, or will one of the other eight teams win?

articles.title: Athlete of the Week: Flying on the tennis court
articles.description: This week, 1130 NewsRadio’s Marcus Fitzgerald speaks with Claire Minns, as she prepares to represent Canada in Portugal at the ITF Masters Tour World Championships this summer.

articles.title: After six months of silence from Mars probe, NASA to pull plug on mission
articles.description: MAVEN was intended to operate for one or two years, but the probe remained active for more than a decade, until Dec. 2025 when it lost contact with Earth

articles.title: Progress and work still needed: Fraser Health’s Chief Medical Health Officer reflects on a decade of toxic drugs
articles.description: April marked a decade since toxic drug poisonings were declared a public health emergency.

articles.title: Senate Republicans axe $1bn for Trump's new White House ballroom
articles.description: The bill to fund immigration agencies has been delayed by opposition to Trump's 'anti-weaponisation fund'.

articles.title: Nigeria’s second-chance schools: women balancing study and survival
articles.description: Women in northern Nigeria return to school after years out, but must balance childcare, duties and costs.

articles.title: Safety concerns drive decline in quality of life perceptions in Kelowna
articles.description: Safety concerns, along with poverty and homelessness, were among the top reasons cited for the decline.

articles.title: Germany blames Russia for 'bitter defeat' in UN Security Council bid
articles.description: Johann Wadephul said it was "no secret" Russia had stirred up sentiment against Germany over its support for Ukraine.

articles.title: Treasury Yield Rises Most in Two Weeks After Jobs Gauge
articles.description: Treasuries fell Wednesday after a gauge of private-sector employment growth left intact expectations that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates this year.

articles.title: OpenAI and Anthropic Sign Letter to Prevent AI-Developed Biological Weapons
articles.description: Leading AI labs, executives, and scientists are sending a letter to lawmakers urging them to improve tracking of synthetic DNA sequences that could be used for bioweapons.

articles.title: Australia wants tech giants to pay media companies for news. Meta calls it ‘grossly unfair’
articles.description: The draft laws, unveiled earlier this year, have been designed to stop social media companies from simply stripping news from local publishers' platforms
